productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Viveca White Floral Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite floral print dress made of 60s cambric, with smocking on the chest, elasticated ruffle straps, ruffled edges around the armhole and ruffles on the hemline, with white fabric lining and floral print pantiesFittingRegular Chest - 30 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get ready to indulge your little girl in the spirit of spring with this white floral print dress from gini and jony. The pink flowers on the soft white background makes this dress very sweet and girly. Team this with comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
